/Users/alhassanahmed/Desktop/User Testin.title: Unexpected Login State
/Users/alhassanahmed/Desktop/User Testin.description: Users are automatically logged in with a 'Survey Corps' account without creating one, leading to confusion and security concerns.

/Users/alhassanahmed/Desktop/User Testin.title: Missing Account Creation Option
/Users/alhassanahmed/Desktop/User Testin.description: Users cannot find an email/password account creation option after logging out, preventing them from completing the task.

/Users/alhassanahmed/Desktop/User Testin.title: Incorrect Sample Tasks Displayed
/Users/alhassanahmed/Desktop/User Testin.description: Users are presented with unrelated, seemingly random tasks upon landing on the page, creating confusion and hindering their understanding of the app's purpose.

/Users/alhassanahmed/Desktop/User Testin.title: No Clear Account Management
/Users/alhassanahmed/Desktop/User Testin.description: Users cannot find a way to create an account or logout, forcing them to rely on guesswork and trial-and-error to proceed.

/Users/alhassanahmed/Desktop/User Testin.title: Security Concerns: Automatic Login
/Users/alhassanahmed/Desktop/User Testin.description: Automatic and unexplained login raises major security concerns and erodes user trust in the application.
